title: Pouvoirs
text_preview: FULL POWERS I, the undersigned, POUL SCHLÜTER, Acting Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Kingdom of Demark, do hereby authorize Mr. BENNY KIMBERG, Commander of the Order of the Dannebrog, Ambassador of the Kingdom of Demark in Paris to sign on behalf of the Kingdom of Demark subject to ratification and with reservation for application to Greenland and the Faroe Islands the Convention for the Protection of the Marin…

pages.text:
FULL POWERS

I, the undersigned, POUL SCHLÜTER, Acting Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Kingdom of Demark, do hereby authorize Mr. BENNY KIMBERG,

Commander of the Order of the Dannebrog, Ambassador of the Kingdom of

Demark in Paris to sign on behalf of the Kingdom of Demark subject to ratification and with reservation for application to Greenland and the Faroe

Islands the Convention for the Protection of the Marine Environment of the

North-East Atlantic.

Copenhagen, 22 September 1992

Pun kerit
